en: But understand this, that in the last days there will come times of difficulty.
zh: 你應當知道，末後的日子必有艱難的時期來到。

en: For people will be lovers of self, lovers of money, proud, arrogant, abusive, disobedient to their parents, ungrateful, unholy,
zh: 那時，人會專愛自己、貪愛錢財、自誇、高傲、褻瀆、悖逆父母、忘恩負義、不聖潔、

en: heartless, unappeasable, slanderous, without self-control, brutal, not loving good,
zh: 沒有親情、不肯和解、惡言中傷、不能自律、橫蠻兇暴、不愛良善、

en: treacherous, reckless, swollen with conceit, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God,
zh: 賣主賣友、容易衝動、傲慢自大、愛享樂過於愛 神，

en: having the appearance of godliness, but denying its power. Avoid such people.
zh: 有敬虔的形式，卻否定敬虔的能力；這些人你應當避開。

en: For among them are those who creep into households and capture weak women, burdened with sins and led astray by various passions,
zh: 他們中間有人潛入別人的家裡，操縱無知的婦女。這些婦女被罪壓住，又被各種私慾拖累，

en: always learning and never able to arrive at a knowledge of the truth.
zh: 雖然常常學習，總不能充分明白真理。

en: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, so these men also oppose the truth, men corrupted in mind and disqualified regarding the faith.
zh: 從前閻儡和閻悖怎樣反對摩西，這些人也怎樣反對真理。他們的心思敗壞，信仰也經不起考驗。

en: But they will not get very far, for their folly will be plain to all, as was that of those two men.
zh: 然而他們不能再這樣下去了，因為他們的愚昧終必在眾人面前顯露出來，好像那兩個人一樣。

en: You, however, have followed my teaching, my conduct, my aim in life, my faith, my patience, my love, my steadfastness,
zh: 但是，你已經了解我的教訓、品行、志向、信心、寬容、愛心和忍耐，

en: my persecutions and sufferings that happened to me at Antioch, at Iconium, and at Lystra- which persecutions I endured; yet from them all the Lord rescued me.
zh: 以及我在安提阿、以哥念、路司得所受的苦和迫害。我所忍受的是怎樣的迫害；這一切主都救我脫離了。

en: Indeed, all who desire to live a godly life in Christ Jesus will be persecuted,
zh: 其實，所有立志在基督耶穌裡過敬虔生活的，都必遭受迫害。

en: while evil people and impostors will go on from bad to worse, deceiving and being deceived.
zh: 但惡人和騙子必越來越壞，他們欺騙人，也必受欺騙。

en: But as for you, continue in what you have learned and have firmly believed, knowing from whom you learned it
zh: 你應當遵守所學和確信的；你知道是跟誰學的，

en: and how from childhood you have been acquainted with the sacred writings, which are able to make you wise for salvation through faith in Christ Jesus.
zh: 並且知道自己從小就明白聖經，這聖經能夠使你有智慧，可以因信基督耶穌得著救恩。

en: All Scripture is breathed out by God and profitable for teaching, for reproof, for correction, and for training in righteousness,
zh: 全部聖經都是 神所默示的，在教訓、責備、矯正和公義的訓練各方面，都是有益的，

en: that the man of God may be competent, equipped for every good work.
zh: 為要使屬 神的人裝備好，可以完成各樣的善工。
